diagnoses.root_cause: Pod failing because secret db-password does not exist

remediation.summary: Create the missing Secret or update pod references
steps: Create the referenced secret in the same namespace as the failing pod
Ensure expected key names match the pod env/volume references
Restart workload rollout after the secret is created or corrected

diagnoses.root_cause: Service selector does not match any pod labels
evidence: service=prod/payments selector=[app=payments] has no matched pods

remediation.summary: Align Service selectors with workload pod labels
steps: Compare service selector keys/values against pod labels
Update the service selector or workload labels to match
Confirm endpoints are populated after reconciliation

diagnoses.root_cause: Ingress/egress rules do not permit required peer and port communication
evidence: Pod/prod/payments-api -> NetworkPolicy/prod/deny-all (egress has no matching peers/ports in context policies=[NetworkPolicy/prod/deny-all]) source=networkpolicy.egress

remediation.summary: Allow required peer and port combinations in NetworkPolicy
steps: Identify blocked service or pod traffic paths from the evidence chain
Add explicit ingress/egress peers and required ports for expected flows
Re-test connectivity after applying policy updates
